item.title: SMS Gateway Software [Utilities]
item.itunes:title: SMS Gateway Software [Utilities]
item.itunes:author: datarecoverydigcam
item.itunes:summary:
SMS Gateway Software
(Utilities)
How to send free SMS text messaging around the world? SMS gateway software instantly sends unlimited number of text messages (SMS) to one or multiple cell phones from your desktop. PC to mobile SMS Software provides an instant solution to forward text messages to individual contacts or multiple groups via your PC or laptop. Unlimited text messaging tool can save limitless mobile contact numbers and can save all sent messages. Free SMS service can operate without internet connection to broadcast bulk SMS worldwide. Free SMS gateway utility is quite useful for broadcasting event alert notifications, season greetings, invitations, promotional campaigns, contacting employee, personalized SMS etc. Application product runs under Windows 11,Win 10,Win 8 operating system. Bulk text messaging software includes features like delivery reports, concatenated messages, Unicode, alpha, numeric or dynamic sender ID etc. Business text messaging utility broadcasts and delivers SMS messages from your PC to groups or individual recipients on the GSM & CDMA network worldwide. Software have its own memory to store all of your contact lists or user can manually enter or import the mobile numbers from a text files and cell phone memory. Text messaging software can send mobile SMS in English and other languages that are support the Unicode characters. To enjoy this service download a free trial and you can start sending free text messages today! Features: * SMS text message service sends free text messages to any international or local mobile phone from any computer with having internet connection. * SMS gateway provider allows sent SMS to be automatically saved and viewed by the user whenever requires. * SMS messenger utility maintains the mass SMS delivering reports. * Mobile text messaging software provides help option to explain how to send SMS on mobile.

[read more]

item.title: Undelete NTFS Partition [Utilities]
item.itunes:title: Undelete NTFS Partition [Utilities]
item.itunes:author: undeletefiles
item.itunes:summary:
Undelete NTFS Partition
(Utilities)
Take advantage of freeware Undelete NTFS Partition file salvage software from www.undelete.co.in to restore important pictures, memorable wedding snaps, wallpapers, screensaver and other media files from logically crashed NTFS disk drive. Comprehensive windows file recovery software is fully integrated with advanced disk scanning mechanism that facilitates user to scan whole disk partitions and restore only selected files as per user requirements.

[read more]

item.title: Android Data Recovery Program [Utilities]
item.itunes:title: Android Data Recovery Program [Utilities]
item.itunes:author: pendriverecovery
item.itunes:summary:
Android Data Recovery Program
(Utilities)
Are you searching for an affordable solution to regain important data from corrupted or formatted android mobiles? Android Data Recovery Program offers different types of search recovery algorithm that deeply scans your android technology based storage devices to salvage your precious pictures, audio-video clips, songs and other documents without requiring any extra efforts or time.

[read more]

item.title: Convert MDB Files [Utilities]
item.itunes:title: Convert MDB Files [Utilities]
item.itunes:author: datarecoverydigcam
item.itunes:summary:
Convert MDB Files
(Utilities)
Professional MS Access to MySQL database migration utility convert table structures, attributes, null values relationships with all properties parameter. Microsoft Access database to MySQL server migrating software import selected data tables of large database files and convert into MySQL server data in table format quickly. MS Access to MySQL database migration tool is high speed database conversion software converts large database records quickly and efficiently. MS Access database transformation application converts entire or selected database record according to your choice. MS Access DB to MySQL server migration program effectively converts database into table, rows and column and does not affect the functionality of any database application. MS Access to MySQL database conversion software is cost effective database conversion tool supports all major data types, attributes, databases, primary key constraints. MS Access to MySQL database conversion tool efficiently runs under Windows 11,Win 10,Win 8 and other operating system. Features:- * Microsoft Access to MySQL database migration application accurately transfers MS Access record. * Professional MS Access database conversion software supports entire database migration into MySQL server with primary key, unique key, null, default value. * MS Access DB record utility accurately converts password protected MDB files into MySQL. * MS Access database to MySQL server converter tool efficiently migrate Access database records and merges converted database record into existing MySQL database. * MS Access to MySQL database conversion program has user friendly GUI interface.

[read more]
item.description:
Convert MDB Files
(Utilities)

item.title: Pen Drive Recovery App [Utilities]
item.itunes:title: Pen Drive Recovery App [Utilities]
item.itunes:author: pendriverecovery
item.itunes:summary:
Pen Drive Recovery App
(Utilities)
Easy to download media file salvage utility is inbuilt with quite simple window based graphical interface so that every user easily use this system to recover deleted data within a few spam of time. Secure and cost effective Pen Drive Recovery Software provides free download trial version from www.pendriverecovery.org to evaluate efficiency and understand all available features. Non-destructive file retrieval program offers advance thumbnail preview facility to view all deleted or misplaced images from different locations before their actual recovery. Professional removable media restoration application easily restores permanently deleted document using shift + Del key or even when system displayed message like Drive not formatted. Highly reliable picture restoration utility is able to undelete deleted crucial file or folders due to any data loss cases like accidental deletion, logically corrupted storage device, human error, inaccessible drive, formatted or unformatted drive and many more other reasons. Advanced lost file retrieval utility facilitates swift and automated disk scanning methods to rescue and regain misplaced or forgotten official documents from any storage devices like pen drive, handheld computer, mobile communicator, micro drive, video games, PDA, etc. Amazing digital image restoration tool uses challenging technology to scan corrupted media files saved in any format and recover your data in original form.Features:*Easy to use file recovery application provides thumbnail preview of all deleted digital images before their final restoration.*Best and economical media drive retrieval program easily locate all lost or erased important data and restore it at user specified location.*Freeware removable media recovery software is fully capable to regain missing data just in few mouse clicks from different storage devices.*Highly reliable file retrieval program provides backup of entire deleted or forgotten images for future reference in original form.

[read more]

item.title: Flash card files undelete tool [Utilities]
item.itunes:title: Flash card files undelete tool [Utilities]
item.itunes:author: datarecoverydigcam
item.itunes:summary:
Flash card files undelete tool
(Utilities)
Digital multimedia card data recovery tool is helpful for data and image recovery. Software recover deleted, lost and formatted digital images, video, audio files from corrupted or formatted media such as Smart media, Compact flash, sD, xD, Secure digital card, Memory stick ,Micro drive or any other media device used in digital device. Tool retrieve data, files from memory cards even error message like” device is not formatted would you like to format now?” is displayed. Tool restores MMC data, files, folders, which may be damaged due to turning your camera off during a write read process or the card being pulled out while your camera is on. This program is developed for memory cards used by digital camera and various mobile phones. Software retrieves recovers the photos and movie clips from the source memory card and saves them to the destination location you specify. Tool searches your media at a low level to recover deleted photos and display them to you then starts data recovery. Tool supports all types of multimedia cards such as Digital Dream, Casio, HP, Fuji film, Ricoh, Panasonic, Konica, Sony, Samsung, and Vivitar. Utility restore not detected 3gp MP3, MPG, and MPEG, MIDI, MRW, Canon .crw, Fuji .raf, Olympus .orf, Kodak .dcr, Minolta .mrw, Nikon .nef, Sigma , QuickTime .mov, .avi, .wav, .dss formats video movie files. Tool works by extracting images, picture from the internal data structure of the card, even if that card and its files are not recognized by Windows. Features:- * It is non-destructive and read-only software. * Safe and cost-effective solution for data, image recovery. * Recover data, photos deleted by command “DELETE-ALL” or emptied by recycle-bin * Restore damaged files, images * User friendly and easy to use due to interactive graphical interface. * Retrieve unreadable 3gp, MP3, MP4, MPEG, and JPEG from removable digital storage device. * Recovery process is very fast and reliable

[read more]
item.description:
Flash card files undelete tool
(Utilities)
Digital multimedia card data recovery tool is helpful for data and image recovery. Software recover deleted, lost and formatted digital images, video, audio files from corrupted or formatted media such as Smart media, Compact flash, sD, xD, Secure digital card, Memory stick ,Micro drive or any other media device used in digital device. Tool retrieve data, files from memory cards even error message like” device is not formatted would you like to format now?” is displayed. This program is developed for memory cards used by digital camera and various mobile phones. Software retrieves recovers the photos and movie clips from the source memory card and saves them to the destination location you specify. Utility restore not detected 3gp MP3, MPG, and MPEG, MIDI, MRW, Canon .crw, Fuji .raf, Olympus .orf, Kodak .dcr, Minolta .mrw, Nikon .nef, Sigma , QuickTime .mov, .avi, .wav, .dss formats video movie files. Tool works by extracting images, picture from the internal data structure of the card, even if that card and its files are not recognized by Windows. Features:- * It is non-destructive and read-only software. * Safe and cost-effective solution for data, image recovery. * Recover data, photos deleted by command “DELETE-ALL” or emptied by recycle-bin * Restore damaged files, images * User friendly and easy to use due to interactive graphical interface. * Retrieve unreadable 3gp, MP3, MP4, MPEG, and JPEG from removable digital storage device. * Recovery process is very fast and reliable

[read more]

(Utilities)
Digital multimedia card data recovery tool is helpful for data and image recovery. Software recover deleted, lost and formatted digital images, video, audio files from corrupted or formatted media such as Smart media, Compact flash, sD, xD, Secure digital card, Memory stick ,Micro drive or any other media device used in digital device. Tool retrieve data, files from memory cards even error message like” device is not formatted would you like to format now?” is displayed. Tool restores MMC data, files, folders, which may be damaged due to turning your camera off during a write read process or the card being pulled out while your camera is on. This program is developed for memory cards used by digital camera and various mobile phones. Software retrieves recovers the photos and movie clips from the source memory card and saves them to the destination location you specify. Tool searches your media at a low level to recover deleted photos and display them to you then starts data recovery. Tool works by extracting images, picture from the internal data structure of the card, even if that card and its files are not recognized by Windows. Features:- * It is non-destructive and read-only software. * Safe and cost-effective solution for data, image recovery. * Recover data, photos deleted by command “DELETE-ALL” or emptied by recycle-bin * Restore damaged files, images * User friendly and easy to use due to interactive graphical interface. * Retrieve unreadable 3gp, MP3, MP4, MPEG, and JPEG from removable digital storage device. * Recovery process is very fast and reliable

[read more]

item.title: Undelete Thumb Drive [Utilities]
item.itunes:title: Undelete Thumb Drive [Utilities]
item.itunes:author: pendriverecovery
item.itunes:summary:
Undelete Thumb Drive
(Utilities)
USB drive data salvage software allows you to recover all pen drive data losses in a matter of minutes. Deleted pen drive data restoration utility retrieve and restore missing data in USB flash drive from all invalid data loss situations such as accidental deletion, user errors, formatted system, power failure, hardware malfunctioning, virus attacks, corruption, or improper removable of drive from computer etc. USB drive files recovery program undelete any lost and corrupted data on your pen drive even if the entire pen drive has been quick-formatted. Memory stick data repair application reads the files which are recoverable and copied them into user defined location. USB hard disk data recovery tool restore deleted files, including JPG, DOC, XLS, digital camera photos, ZIP, RAR, DBX, PST, MP3, MPEG, email, databases and other office productivity applications and more. Professional USB drive data recovery software allows you to recover files that have been deleted by bypassing the normal deletion process (e.g. Shift-Delete). Corrupted USB drive data recovery utility apply valid restoration procedure on Thumb drive, Zip drive, Compact drive, Flash drive, USB drive, Memory stick, Pen drive, Key drive etc to recover data. Best USB hard drive recovery software adapts advanced technologies to scan the corrupt USB files and recover your data in them as much as possible, so to minimize the loss in file corruption.USB memory files recovery tool can easily be installed on any windows operating system including Vista.Features:*Freeware USB drive data recovery software retrieves data lost due to logical corruption and bad sectors.*Formatted pen drive data recovery utility easily restores all inaccessible contents stored in any corrupted USB drive.*Download free undelete thumb drive tool which offers option to preview lost data before it is fully restored.*Software scans pen drive, locates deleted data and save it to the safe location of hard drive.

[read more]
item.description:
Undelete Thumb Drive
(Utilities)

[read more]

item.title: Pen Drive Recovery Application [Utilities]
item.itunes:title: Pen Drive Recovery Application [Utilities]
item.itunes:author: pendriverecovery
item.itunes:summary:
Pen Drive Recovery Application
(Utilities)
Advance pen drive information restoration application is well known, widely used or powerful software which provides flexibility with recovery of several file types such as jpeg, mpeg, bmp, png, wav, mov, wmf, emf, exif, riff, tiff, gif, avi, midi quick time and so many types. Download data retrieval software runs with support of different types of Windows operating system versions like Windows 11, 10, 8 and many more. Professional drive retrieval software recovers data from different types of storage devices like pen drives, USB drives, Hard drives, Jump drives, multimedia, drives, smart drives, key drives, super media drives jet flash drives and many more of several brands such as Kingston, Lexar, Panasonic, Philips, Sony, Samsung, Jenoptik, HP, Philips, Vikings, SanDisk, Lumicron, Apacer, Transcend, Jet flash etc. Free pen drive data retrieval software does not require any kind of technical knowledge to understand and operate program and easily works with all types of users as novice and skilled one.Features:* Thumb drive image regain tool retrieves all lost information even in case when Drive not formatted message is being displayed by smart drives holding devices.* USB drive file rescue software retrieves deleted files, folders etc from several audio, video, and text file formats such as jpeg, mpeg, avi, ram, wav, wpd, wps, mp4, m4v, wma, mpa and many more.* Smart drive data rescue software supports user friendly and interactive graphical user interface which makes program very easy and efficient for all technical and nontechnical users.* Advance key drive image retrieval software rescues all important files, pictures in situation when pen drive is being pulled out from devices which hold pen drives etc.* Freeware pen drive information recovery software regains all significant deleted snaps, files, folders and other documents that are lost due to software malfunctions.

[read more]
item.description:
Pen Drive Recovery Application
(Utilities)

Advance pen drive information restoration application is well known, widely used or powerful software which provides flexibility with recovery of several file types such as jpeg, mpeg, bmp, png, wav, mov, wmf, emf, exif, riff, tiff, gif, avi, midi quick time and so many types. Download data retrieval software runs with support of different types of Windows operating system versions like Windows 11, 10, 8 and many more. Professional drive retrieval software recovers data from different types of storage devices like pen drives, USB drives, Hard drives, Jump drives, multimedia, drives, smart drives, key drives, super media drives jet flash drives and many more of several brands such as Kingston, Lexar, Panasonic, Philips, Sony, Samsung, Jenoptik, HP, Philips, Vikings, SanDisk, Lumicron, Apacer, Transcend, Jet flash etc. Free pen drive data retrieval software does not require any kind of technical knowledge to understand and operate program and easily works with all types of users as novice and skilled one.Features:* Thumb drive image regain tool retrieves all lost information even in case when Drive not formatted message is being displayed by smart drives holding devices.* USB drive file rescue software retrieves deleted files, folders etc from several audio, video, and text file formats such as jpeg, mpeg, avi, ram, wav, wpd, wps, mp4, m4v, wma, mpa and many more.* Smart drive data rescue software supports user friendly and interactive graphical user interface which makes program very easy and efficient for all technical and nontechnical users.* Advance key drive image retrieval software rescues all important files, pictures in situation when pen drive is being pulled out from devices which hold pen drives etc.* Freeware pen drive information recovery software regains all significant deleted snaps, files, folders and other documents that are lost due to software malfunctions.

[read more]

item.title: Laptop Vista Partition Recovery Tool [Utilities]
item.itunes:title: Laptop Vista Partition Recovery Tool [Utilities]
item.itunes:author: datarecoverydigcam
item.itunes:summary:
Laptop Vista Partition Recovery Tool
(Utilities)
Hard drive crashed partition repair software recover accidentally formatted or deleted MS Word Excel Access Power point retrieve doc xls mdb ppt jpg gif bmp MPEG MOV AVI MIDI files and restore audio video pictures photos images mp3. Undelete data retrieval tool rescue deleted files from SATA, PATA, IDE, ATA, SCSI storage disk. Windows data backup tools salvage data from digital storage media. FAT/NTFS data rescue solution recaptures all deleted MBR, MFT, DBR, exe, dll registries from crashed hard disk. Notebook windows data recovery utility extracts documents even deleted by using (shift+ Del) keys. Advance Vista partition recovery supports windows operating systems including 11, 10, 8, XP, Server 2024 and Vista. Disk partition recovery solution is simple, easy to use and provides attractive Graphical user interface (GUI). Windows data recovery software is complete hard drive recovery utility that recover vital and crucial data from Personal Laptop Computer or Notebook drive. Software support large partition size drives and provides facility to preview files before actual recovery.Features:*Recovery software can restore accidentally deleted files and folder from Recycle Bin.*software rescue your formatted data even your computer display an error message like drive is not formatted would you like to format it now?*Supports all major brands of storage media like Sony, SanDisk, Samsung, Seagate, Hitachi, Toshiba etc.*Undelete files repair software can detects and recover data from primary or extended partitions.*Best Graphical user interface (GUI) for easy and quick Windows data recovery*Windows data salvage tools restore data in as little time and software is cost effective, most convenient.*Provides data recovery after the deletion of boot sector or Master file table.

[read more]

Laptop Vista Partition Recovery Tool
(Utilities)
Hard drive crashed partition repair software recover accidentally formatted or deleted MS Word Excel Access Power point retrieve doc xls mdb ppt jpg gif bmp MPEG MOV AVI MIDI files and restore audio video pictures photos images mp3. Undelete data retrieval tool rescue deleted files from SATA, PATA, IDE, ATA, SCSI storage disk. Windows data backup tools salvage data from digital storage media. FAT/NTFS data rescue solution recaptures all deleted MBR, MFT, DBR, exe, dll registries from crashed hard disk. Notebook windows data recovery utility extracts documents even deleted by using (shift+ Del) keys. Advance Vista partition recovery supports windows operating systems including 11, 10, 8, XP, Server 2024 and Vista. Disk partition recovery solution is simple, easy to use and provides attractive Graphical user interface (GUI). Windows data recovery software is complete hard drive recovery utility that recover vital and crucial data from Personal Laptop Computer or Notebook drive. Software support large partition size drives and provides facility to preview files before actual recovery.Features:*Recovery software can restore accidentally deleted files and folder from Recycle Bin.*software rescue your formatted data even your computer display an error message like drive is not formatted would you like to format it now?*Supports all major brands of storage media like Sony, SanDisk, Samsung, Seagate, Hitachi, Toshiba etc.*Undelete files repair software can detects and recover data from primary or extended partitions.*Best Graphical user interface (GUI) for easy and quick Windows data recovery*Windows data salvage tools restore data in as little time and software is cost effective, most convenient.*Provides data recovery after the deletion of boot sector or Master file table.
